summary: Completed testing of Titelli notifications system and form improvements. All backend APIs (24/24 tests passed) working correctly. Frontend forms and notifications dropdown verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Services/Products API - POST /api/services-products (create service with all fields)
Services/Products API - POST /api/services-products (create product with all fields)
Services/Products API - Validation (422 for missing required fields)
Order Notification - Creating order triggers notification for enterprise
Frontend - Dashboard loads with stats (1,234 views, 4 orders, 270 CHF, 4.5 rating)
Frontend - Notifications bell shows badge with unread count
Frontend - Notifications dropdown opens with order notifications
Frontend - 'Tout lire' (Mark all read) button visible
Frontend - Service/Product form modal opens with all fields (Name, Description, Type, Category, Price, Delivery)
Frontend - Training form modal opens with all fields (Title, Description, Duration, Price, Category, Online checkbox)
critical_code_review_comments: Training form validation: Price field is required but UI shows 422 error if not filled - form validation working correctly
seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend tests was cleaned up automatically via TestCleanup class
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notifications system fully tested. Order notifications are automatically created when a client places an order. Notifications appear in header dropdown with unread badge. All form modals (Service/Product, Training, Job, Offer) are working with proper validation. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_notifications_and_forms.py can be reused for regression testing.

api_endpoints: PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read - Mark single notification as read
PUT /api/notifications/read-all - Mark all notifications as read
notifications.auto_creation: Notifications automatically created when order is placed (via create_order_notification helper)
notifications.frontend_display: Bell icon with red badge showing unread count, dropdown with notification list, 'Tout lire' button

forms.service_product: Modal with Name, Description, Type (Service/Product), Category, Price, Delivery checkbox
forms.training: Modal with Title, Description, Duration, Price, Category, Online checkbox
forms.job: Modal with Title, Description, Job Type, Location, Salary range
forms.offer: Modal with Title, Description, Discount value, Date range
